name: Asparagus with Mustard Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 lb. asparagus, cleaned and cut into pieces
recipeInstructions:
Total Cooking Time: 7 to 9 minutes.
1. In a 2-quart microproof casserole, combine asparagus and water. Cover.
2. Cook on High (maximum power) for 6 to 7 minutes, or until tender, stirring once during cooking time. Drain.
3. Combine remaining ingredients in the casserole, mixing lightly to coat the asparagus.
4. Cook on High (maximum power) for 1 to 2 minutes, or until heated through.
